message:
feat(pager): eliminate page 1 MVCC conflicts and group commit improvements (bd-3wop3.8)

Page 1 Contention Fix:
- Remove spurious page 1 MVCC conflicts in WAL mode for freelist and db_growth
- Only track page 1 conflicts for direct schema modifications (CREATE/DROP TABLE)
- Synthetic page 1 changes (change counter, page count, freelist metadata) are
  safely serialized by inner.lock() during Phase A commit
- Eliminates ~2000 spurious conflicts at higher thread counts

Group Commit Improvements:
- Real flusher/waiter cooperative batching with ConsolidationPhase tracking
- Atomic epoch counter for lock-free waiter polling (completed_epoch)
- Refactored WAL backend access via with_wal_backend/has_wal_backend helpers
- SharedWalBackend now passed explicitly to avoid interior lock contention

Additional Changes:
- C API compatibility expansion
- MVCC invariant assertions for commit combiner
- Connection execute_group_by improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
